rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when inserting annex blocks
Validate all references in generated AGREE clauses against visible identifiers
Avoid using AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Delete or rewrite clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use existing visible identifiers
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
